nits: Page-added adapter uses last_edited_time so an EDIT of an existing page will fire the 'page-added' trigger — matches spec wording literally but is semantically misleading; downstream consumers should be aware.
PAGE_CAP=50 pages * 100 page_size = up to 5000 records per poll with no warning signal if cap is hit; consider logging when the loop exits due to cap rather than has_more=false.
initialState ignores its args parameter (eslint-noUnusedVars would flag in strict mode); harmless.
reviewer: opus-4.7 adversarial pass via Agent tool
